final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a macro close-up of a water droplet reflecting the world, surrounded by grass blades and dew drops, for phone wallpaper.

Style/medium: photorealistic macro photography, nature documentary aesthetic, shallow depth of field
Composition: extreme close-up of single water droplet, centered in frame, soft circular bokeh background
Subject: pristine water droplet acting as natural lens, reflecting inverted miniature world, surrounded by delicate grass blades and smaller dew drops
Scene/backdrop: early morning meadow, soft green grass blades curving around the droplet, out-of-focus circular light spots (bokeh) in background
Lighting/mood: soft diffused morning light, gentle backlighting creating subtle rim light on droplet, serene and magical atmosphere
Color palette: fresh greens as dominant, crystal clear water with subtle rainbow refractions, warm golden bokeh spots as accent
Materials/textures: glossy spherical water surface with surface tension, wet grass with visible veins, soft ethereal background blur
Avoid: oversaturated colors, artificial lighting effects, deformed reflections, watermarks, plastic-looking droplets, 8K stuffer words
